action.reasoning: Observation: The batch approach fails with '720895 vs 720896' error for specific objects. Per-view processing worked in iter 17 (SUCCESS). The batch approach has a mysterious off-by-one for some camera params. Analysis: The safest fix is to process each view individually (proven to work). The speed concern: 22 objects in 139s = 6.3s/object, 100 objects = 630s. The eval system likely has a longer timeout than the framework command timeout. I'll submit eval with per-view processing. Decision: Fix predict.py to use per-view rendering (1 view at a time), which is proven to work. Submit eval immediately.
